subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! We have heard the tumult of thy heart, the cry of thy soul, and the lamentation of thy limbs, and We have beheld the consuming fire of thy being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد سمعنا ضجیج قلبک و صریخ فوادک و حنین جوارحک و راینا اشتعال ارکانک
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
